goal: Fix the public detail On This Page/On This Work TOC rail width so collapse controls and TOC text are not squeezed on desktop.
changed: Added Playwright regression coverage for Blog and Work detail TOC rail, title, Collapse/Expand button, and long-heading text width.
Changed desktop detail grids to allocate an explicit 22rem right rail.
Removed extra desktop aside padding that consumed TOC text width.
Hardened TableOfContents header flex sizing and gave the Collapse/Expand button a stable 4.75rem minimum width.
notChanged: Backend, DTO, load-test, HLS, cache, or production server behavior.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3010 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible npx playwright test tests/public-blog-toc-layout.spec.ts tests/public-work-toc.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --workers=1
validations.red: failed as expected with TOC width 144px

validations.result: passed with 0 errors and 5 existing warnings
